desc.en: The system does not have a designated colour, so I used the colour of the system in the map shown in https://encrypted-tbn0.gstatic.com/images?q=tbn:ANd9GcR0RHKv5LUusMOLl-VdnlRUfl7osFBVXdfn9Ta_lN2KdYMrJRgmITY6vpq5&s=10 from the government of Jacksonville, FL (https://www.jacksonville.gov)'s website. Other information are based on the system's Wikipedia page.
